change: Candidate changed resident GGUF Q8_0 T16 shared-expert gate/up (out_features<=512) tile selection for rows>=2048 from TM32/TN16 to TM64/TN16; a broader in=512,out=2048 rows>=2048 TM64/TN32 variant was also screened and rejected before the final measurement.

hardware: GPU1 gfx1100 / AMD Radeon RX 7900 XTX class, TheRock HIP 7.13

microbench_summary.broader_variant_primary_gate: A broader candidate with both gate/up TM64/TN16 and down TM64/TN32 measured 512/128 1923.978/127.124 tok/s and 4K/128 2281.233/115.239 tok/s, also failing prefill promotion.

notes: The final measured candidate improved 4K decode slightly but regressed 4K prefill and had a low 512 prefill median, so it was not retained.
The 128K final gate was not run because the primary prompt verifier failed.
The code/test changes were reverted before committing this rejected-attempt artifact.
rejection_reason: Primary prefill regressed versus the previous retained default despite stable IDs/memory and a small decode gain. The prompt verifier failed, 128K was not run, and the code/tests were reverted.
